subcodes.title: Cablegram dated 1913-02-03
subcodes.first_line_orig: We have reached Paris. Greetings to all. Any Persian, be he my own son or daughter, if he comes to America without having a new permission written in my own handwiting or signature, do not meet him at all...
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
